description: Route policy cases for moving SISO from regex/cost routing toward GPT-5.5 controller allocation. currentRoute is the known behavior before the controller-first rewrite; desiredOutcome is the target behavior.

cases.task: Implement Stripe subscription checkout, webhook idempotency, and billing portal in the Next.js app

desiredOutcome.reason: Payments and webhook idempotency are high-risk multi-domain implementation work.

cases.task: Design and implement authentication with middleware, session storage, and route guards

desiredOutcome.reason: Architecture plus implementation should not bypass the GPT-5.5 controller because of the word implement.

cases.task: Audit the security of auth, payments, and deployment config, then patch the highest risk issues

desiredOutcome.reason: Security audit plus mutation requires review-first planning and controlled patching.

cases.task: Create a React dashboard for customer billing analytics with charts and filters

desiredOutcome.reason: Create is implementation language and should not route to read-only scout.

cases.task: Make a new Next.js page for the admin dashboard

desiredOutcome.reason: Make is implementation language; route should be worker-capable at minimum.

cases.task: Create OAuth login and harden session cookie policy

desiredOutcome.reason: OAuth and cookie hardening are security-sensitive implementation tasks.

cases.task: Build a domain specialist allocation plan for auth, billing, frontend, data, and deployment

desiredOutcome.reason: Build can be a planning verb; allocation plans belong to the controller, not verifier.

cases.task: Refactor 8 modules across frontend, API, auth, billing, and tests

desiredOutcome.reason: Large planned refactor is not necessarily rescue/debug; it needs task allocation and verification.

cases.task: Parse JSON webhook payloads and update database writes deterministically

desiredOutcome.reason: JSON/parse words should not override webhook/database domain risk.

cases.task: Review and fix regression in auth middleware

desiredOutcome.reason: Review/regression semantics should not be lost because fix is present.
